---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something for orgkit to do
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the situation where you run into this gap. Concrete is better than abstract — "I have 8 roles and the --analyze output is hard to scan" is more useful than "UX could be better." -->

## What would the solution look like?

<!-- Describe what you'd want to happen. New flag? New command? Different behavior from an existing one? -->

## Have you found any workarounds?

<!-- If you've been hacking around this, say how — it often informs the right fix. -->

## Is this on the roadmap already?

<!-- Check [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) first. If it's there, you can +1 this as a signal of demand rather than opening a new issue. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Related issues, prior art in other tools, edge cases we should think about. -->
